user.title: Multiroom Climate
user.description: Regulate your home to a weighted average of room sensors by wrapping an existing thermostat.

data_description.climate_entity: The thermostat this controller will drive (kept in its AUTO band).
data_description.target_sensors: The room sensors whose weighted average is the temperature to hold.
data_description.humidity_sensor: Optional. When set, cooling overcools slightly while humidity is above target to wring out moisture.

error.no_sensors: Select at least one target temperature sensor.

abort.already_configured: This thermostat is already controlled by a Multiroom Climate entry.

init.title: Day/night schedule
init.description: Optional setback schedule. When enabled, the target follows a day and a night setpoint, reached early by the optimal-start lead. Temperatures are in your system's unit.

data_description.optimal_start_lead: How early to begin each transition so the home reaches the new setpoint by its scheduled time.
